heading: Stream Processing Workspaces
body:
> **Important:** To request an unlisted region, add your feedback
> to the [MongoDB Feedback Portal](https://feedback.mongodb.com/?category=7529546585152608284). Your
> input helps prioritize future expansions of Atlas Stream Processing coverage.Atlas supports deploying [Stream Processing Workspaces](atlas-sp-manage-spi) in the follow AWS (Amazon Web Services) regions:**Americas:**Americas| AWS Region   | Location               | Atlas Region   |
| ------------ | ---------------------- | -------------- |
| us-east-1    | Northern Virginia, USA | US\_EAST\_1    |
| us-east-2    | Ohio, USA              | US\_EAST\_2    |
| us-west-2    | Oregon, USA            | US\_WEST\_2    |
| ca-central-1 | Montreal, QC, Canada   | CA\_CENTRAL\_1 |
| sa-east-1    | Sao Paulo, Brazil      | SA\_EAST\_1    |**Asia-pacific:**Asia Pacific| AWS Region     | Location               | Atlas Region     |
| -------------- | ---------------------- | ---------------- |
| ap-southeast-1 | Singapore              | AP\_SOUTHEAST\_1 |
| ap-southeast-2 | Sydney, NSW, Australia | AP\_SOUTHEAST\_2 |
| ap-south-1     | Mumbai, India          | AP\_SOUTH\_1     |
| ap-northeast-1 | Tokyo, Japan           | AP\_NORTHEAST\_1 |**Europe:**Europe| AWS Region   | Location            | Atlas Region   |
| ------------ | ------------------- | -------------- |
| eu-west-1    | Ireland             | EU\_WEST\_1    |
| eu-central-1 | Frankfurt, Germany  | EU\_CENTRAL\_1 |
| eu-west-2    | London, England, UK | EU\_WEST\_2    |
